name: Touch of Death
Prerequisites: Corpse or remains within line of sight.
Effect: Sense the last moments of the dead or trace a shade's recent passage.

name: Dead Man's Chest
Effect: Bind a minor shade to remain near the remains as a watchful presence.

name: The Caul
Effect: Veil yourself from casual notice as if wrapped in grave-mist; does not fool active scrutiny.

name: Raise the Familiar
Effect: Animate a small corpse as a short-lived servant that obeys simple commands.

name: Plague of Toothy Things
Prerequisites: Organic matter or corpse in the area.
Effect: Summon swarms of vermin or grave-beetles to harass and obscure a zone.

name: Profane Litany
Effect: Whispered curse that erodes Resolve or Composure for the scene (resolved at table).

name: Shroud of Stygia
Prerequisites: Night; place of death or burial nearby.
Effect: Wrap an area in cold, muffling gloom that penalizes mundane perception and steadies the dead.

name: Legion of the Pit
Prerequisites: Multiple corpses or a charnel site (Elder rite).
Effect: Call forth a host of weak shades to harry and confuse intruders; duration and resistance at table.
